subject: Re: Farkas / chopper
body:
of course

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, July 5, 2007 8:16:38 PM
Subject: FW: Farkas / chopper


Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein


-----Original Message-----
From: Dowling, David [mailto:ddowling@islecap.com] 
Sent: Thursday, July 05, 2007 7:59 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Farkas / chopper

Hey Lesley,

Hope you are doing well. I don't have the exact times; however Andrew is
flying to STT July 11th thru the 12th.  He has mentioned some various
sites that he would like to visit in the chopper. Do you mind checking
to see if it's ok with Jeffery if Andrew uses his chopper on the 11th
and / or the 12th. If ok with Jeffery, I will find out the details of
the visits and forward them to you. 
Thx,
David
